summary.intent: Add live integration tests for the Moonshot AI provider to verify API compatibility.
summary.outcome: All 10 Moonshot integration tests pass after working around a Moonshot API constraint where multi-turn tool use requires replaying the original reasoning_content from prior assistant messages.

repo: Moonshot provider uses the kimi-k2.5 model and supports model discovery via a /models endpoint.
Moonshot has a special requirement: assistant tool call messages must include reasoning_content when replayed in multi-turn conversations — empty strings are rejected.
The CompletionResponse type does not capture reasoning_content, making non-streaming multi-turn tool use with Moonshot impossible to reconstruct correctly.
Provider integration tests live in crates/providers/tests/ as separate files per provider (e.g., moonshot_integration.rs).

code.finding: Multi-turn tool use test was adjusted to document the Moonshot reasoning_content replay limitation rather than assert a passing round-trip, since CompletionResponse doesn't preserve reasoning_content for replay.
Serialization adds reasoning_content to assistant tool call messages, but Moonshot rejects empty strings — it requires the actual content from the original inference step.

workflow: Live API integration tests are run directly against provider APIs, not mocked.
Standard flow: write tests, compile, run against live API, debug failures, fix or document known limitations, clippy, commit, push.

friction: Moonshot rejects empty reasoning_content strings in assistant tool call messages — serialization was correct but the actual reasoning text must be preserved end-to-end, which the current data model doesn't support.
9/10 tests passed initially; the multi-turn tool use failure required multiple read/debug iterations to determine the root cause was a product-level data model limitation, not a serialization bug.
open_items: Product bug: CompletionResponse does not capture reasoning_content, making multi-turn tool use with Moonshot (and potentially other reasoning models) broken — needs a design fix to preserve and replay reasoning_content.
A GitHub issue was intended to be filed for the Moonshot multi-turn reasoning_content limitation but is not confirmed as done in the transcript.
